rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE EARLIE B. HARRIS WATTERLY LIVING RESTATE 5/13/2010 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For 1)Financial Abuse Of An Elder Under W&I 15610.070;2)Removal Of Trustee And Confirmation Of Callie Williams As Sole Trustee; 3)Actual Frau
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 8/8/17 pursuant to Joint Status Statement. Mediation must be completed no later than 8/1/17. The parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by 8/3/17. The Court expects discovery to be complete. If the issues are not resolved, counsel are to file a joint status statement regarding the length of trial, number of witnesses, and remaining issues no later than 8/3/17. No further continuance of the order for mediation without an appearance.
